# Realty Holding & Management Consultants (RHMC)

Independent property advisory for buyers, investors, land sellers, and NRIs in Mohali, Punjab.

## Core Expertise
- Independent Property Advisory
- Land & Plot Due Diligence
- NRI & Remote Investment Support
- GMADA and RERA Punjab Compliance
- Commercial and Residential Portfolio Strategy

## Key Author
Amritpal Singh, founder of RHMC, with 10+ years of experience across development, capital markets, and government liaisoning.

## Useful Links
- Properties: https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties
- Blog: https://www.realtyconsultants.in/blog
